name: Training Outcomes Table
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules
description: Table for determining training task outcomes and character advancement

basic_training.narrative: Character undergoes basic skill training and practice

intensive_training.description: Intensive training costs 1 credit but provides 2 XP
intensive_training.narrative: Character receives professional instruction and advanced training

specialized_training.description: Specialized training focuses on specific skills
specialized_training.narrative: Character receives targeted training in their area of expertise

advancement_checks.description: Characters advance when they reach 3 XP

stunned.description: Stunned characters cannot focus on training

motivated.description: Highly motivated characters may gain additional benefits

training_facility.description: Access to proper training facilities improves results

academy.description: Military or technical academies provide superior training

mentor.description: Having an experienced mentor improves training efficiency

CIVILIZED.description: Civilized worlds have better training opportunities

ACADEMIC.description: Academic worlds excel at knowledge-based training

MILITARY.description: Military worlds provide excellent combat training

BACKWATER.description: Limited training opportunities on backwater worlds

combat_training.description: Specialized combat training improves fighting abilities

technical_training.description: Technical training improves technology and repair skills

social_training.description: Social training improves leadership and negotiation abilities

survival_training.description: Survival training improves wilderness and exploration abilities

standard_outcome.narrative: Dedicated practice and study improve the character's abilities

exceptional_outcome.narrative: Outstanding dedication and ideal conditions lead to exceptional progress

breakthrough.narrative: A moment of insight leads to a significant breakthrough in understanding

one_per_turn.rule: Each character can only train once per turn
one_per_turn.description: Training requires dedicated time and focus

status_requirements.rule: Character must be healthy and available
status_requirements.description: Injured or occupied characters cannot train effectively

resource_limits.rule: Some training types require credits or facilities
resource_limits.description: Advanced training may have additional costs
